examples: The clearance rate of Styela clava was determined in different salinity sea water in laboratory.
Styela Clava is a kind of animal that widely spreads in the ocean of this country, especially common in coastal shell breeding cages in Shandong.
We toured nearby Nairn, a fishing port ruled for centuries by the Roses, then drove through fields to the Bronze-Age Clava Cairns, two bus-size circles of stones set within an eerily silent grove.
